/usr/sbin/cc -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/config.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/db.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/gemini.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/processor.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/src/bot.c.o CMakeFiles/tgbot.dir/third_party/cjson/cJSON.c.o -o tgbot  /usr/lib64/libcurl.so /usr/lib64/libsqlite3.so
